titles.title: Born Again (I was down on my luck...)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v2 v3 v4 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was down on my luck, I was stuck I was running 'round broken-hearted I was sinking so fast I couldn't last falling apart.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You could've ran away Leaving me there in my shame Leaving me fighting my pain But You made a better way

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've been saved Goodbye to the sinner, I'm held by the Father above No more shame, for I'm out of the desert and drowned in the power of love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Amazing grace, My soul set free Ain't no grave, Got a hold on me I'm born again, born again Washed by the water, I'm clean

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My eyes have been open You're showing me all of my life in a new light Every step, every breath Like it's the first time

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Preacher told me the good, good news, Went way down deep in the river blue, Preacher told me the good, good news, And ever since my heart met You
